passport_number.label: Passport Number
passport_number.description: Enter the passport number exactly as shown in your passport.

passport_issuing_country.label: Passport Issuing Country
passport_issuing_country.description: Please select the passport issuing country as shown in the passport.

ssn.label: National ID
ssn.description: Enter the 14-digit national ID exactly as recorded on the ID card.

full_name.label: Full Name
full_name.description: Enter your full name as recorded in official documents.

college_is_off_campus.label: Is the college located outside the university campus?
college_is_off_campus.description: Specify whether the college is located outside or inside the university campus. This helps determine the services and facilities available to students in this college.

options.true: The college is located outside the university campus
options.false: The college is located inside the university campus

is_visible.label: Visible for Selection
is_visible.placeholder: Check this box if you want this item to be visible to users

file.max_files_message: You can upload a maximum of {{max}} files only.

buttons.click_or_drag: Click or drag file to upload

otp.label: Verification Code
otp.placeholder: Enter the OTP from left to right

gender.label: Gender
gender.description: Please select the gender as shown on any official document.

religion.label: Religion
religion.description: Please select the religion as shown on the national ID.

nationality.label: Nationality
nationality.description: Please select the nationality as shown on any official document.

page_size.label: Page Size
page_size.invalid_page_size: Invalid page size. Please select a value between 5 and 100.

who_can_apply.label: Who Can Apply?
who_can_apply.placeholder: Enter who can apply during this period

housing_type.label: Desired Housing Type
housing_type.description: Select the type of housing you wish to apply for this year, based on your preferences or health condition.

options.premium: Premium Housing – Offers additional services and higher comfort level with greater privacy for the student.
options.regular: Regular Housing – Basic accommodation providing essential needs without extra features.

meals.label: Do you want meals inside the university housing?
meals.description: Select “Yes” if you want daily meals inside the university housing, and “No” if you do not. Please note that the decision is subject to review by the university housing administration.

options.no: Show students who do not want meals
options.all: Show all students regardless of preference

personal_image.label: Personal Image
personal_image.description: Please upload a recent, clear personal photo with an appropriate background.

national_id_front_image.label: National ID Front Image
national_id_front_image.description: Please upload a clear front image of the national ID, ensuring all data is readable.

national_id_back_image.label: National ID Back Image
national_id_back_image.description: Please upload a clear back image of the national ID, ensuring all data is readable.

passport_image.label: Passport Image
passport_image.description: Please upload a clear image of your passport, ensuring all data is readable.

mobile_number.label: Mobile Number
mobile_number.description: Please enter a valid mobile number for contact.

landline_number.label: Landline Number
landline_number.description: You can enter a landline number if available; this field is optional.

place_of_birth.label: Place of Birth
place_of_birth.description: Enter the place of birth as shown on any official document.

date_of_birth.label: Date of Birth
date_of_birth.description: Please select the date of birth as shown on any official document.

birth_country.label: Country of Birth
birth_country.description: Select the country of birth as shown on any official document.

birth_city.label: City of Birth
birth_city.description: Enter the city of birth as shown on any official document.

country_of_residence.label: Country of Residence
country_of_residence.description: Please select the country you currently reside in.

governorate_of_residence.label: Governorate
governorate_of_residence.description: Please select the governorate where you live.

police_station_or_center.label: Police Station or Center
police_station_or_center.description: Please enter the name of the local police station or center to verify your official address.

city_sheikhdom_or_village.label: City, Sheikhdom, or Village
city_sheikhdom_or_village.description: Please specify the city, sheikhdom, or village where you reside.

detailed_address.label: Detailed Address
detailed_address.description: Please provide the complete address including street name, building, and any important landmarks.

visa_or_residency_image.label: Visa or Residency Image
visa_or_residency_image.description: Please upload a clear image of your visa or residency permit showing all relevant details.

certificate_type.label: Certificate Type
certificate_type.description: Please select the type of educational certificate obtained.

percentage.label: Percentage
percentage.description: Please enter the percentage exactly as shown on the certificate (e.g., 95%).

educational_administration.label: Educational Administration
educational_administration.description: Please enter the name of the educational administration responsible for issuing the certificate.

total_score.label: Total Score
total_score.description: Please enter the total score or final grade as shown on the certificate.

certificate_image.label: Certificate Image
certificate_image.description: Please upload a clear image of the educational certificate so that all details are clearly visible.

certificate_country.label: Certificate Issuing Country
certificate_country.description: Please select the country that issued the certificate. This is used to determine the type of certificate and grading system (e.g., Egyptian or foreign).

administrative_region.label: Governorate
administrative_region.description: Please select the governorate where the educational authority is located.

college.label: College
college.description: Please select the college you are enrolled in.

department_or_program.label: Department or Program
department_or_program.description: Please select the academic department or study program you are enrolled in.

admission_year.label: Admission Year
admission_year.description: Please enter the academic year in which you were admitted to the university.

nomination_card_image.label: Nomination Card Image
nomination_card_image.description: Please upload a clear image of the nomination card issued by the relevant authority.

study_level.label: Study Level
study_level.description: Please select your current study level or academic year.

student_code.label: Student Code
student_code.description: Please enter the official student code as registered at the university.

study_system_type.label: Study System Type
study_system_type.description: Please select the study system you are enrolled in (e.g., Regular System, Credit Hours System).

options.regular: Regular System – A traditional study system based on academic years and fixed semesters.
options.credit_hours: Credit Hours System – A flexible system based on the number of credit hours completed and registered courses.

gpa_or_total_score.label: GPA / Total Score
gpa_or_total_score.description: Please enter your current cumulative GPA or total score according to official academic records.

enrollment_status.label: Enrollment Status
enrollment_status.description: Please select your current enrollment status at the university.

options.enrolled: Enrolled – The student is currently registered and actively studying.
options.new: New – The student has been registered for the first time recently.
options.continuing: Continuing – The student continues their study from a previous academic year.
options.deferred: Deferred – The student’s enrollment has been temporarily postponed for an approved reason.
options.withdrawn: Withdrawn – The student has stopped attending and is no longer continuing.
options.re_enrolled: Re-enrolled – The student has been registered again after a previous interruption or cancellation.
options.repeat_year: Repeat Year – The student is repeating the academic year due to academic requirements.
options.transferred: Transferred – The student has transferred from another institution or program.
options.canceled: Enrollment Canceled – The student’s enrollment has been officially canceled.
options.dismissed: Dismissed – The student has been expelled for academic or disciplinary reasons.
options.graduated: Graduated – The student has successfully completed all academic requirements and graduated.

enrollment_proof_image.label: Enrollment Proof Image
enrollment_proof_image.description: Please upload a clear image of any official document proving your enrollment status.

certificate_from_egypt.label: Did you obtain the educational certificate from inside Egypt?
certificate_from_egypt.description: Select “Yes” if the educational certificate was issued by an educational institution inside the Arab Republic of Egypt, or “No” if it was issued outside Egypt.

guardian_is_egyptian.label: Is the guardian an Egyptian national?
guardian_is_egyptian.description: Select “Yes” if the guardian holds Egyptian nationality, or “No” if they hold another nationality.

job_title.label: Job Title
job_title.placeholder: Enter job title and nature of work
job_title.description: Please enter the current or previous job title and type of work clearly, such as the workplace or professional field.

relationship.label: Relationship
relationship.placeholder: Specify your relationship to the student (e.g., Father, Guardian, Brother, etc.)
relationship.description: Write your relationship to the student to clarify the legal or family connection.

identity_number.label: Identity Number
identity_number.description: Please enter the national ID number or identity card number accurately as listed on the official document.

identity_image.label: Identity Image
identity_image.description: Please upload a clear image of the identity document, ensuring all details are visible and readable.

parents_status.label: Parents’ Status
parents_status.description: Please select the current status of the parents, such as alive, deceased, separated, or any other relevant condition.

family_residency_abroad.label: Does the family reside abroad?
family_residency_abroad.description: Select “Yes” if the family resides outside the Arab Republic of Egypt permanently or temporarily, or “No” if residing inside Egypt.

application_result_method.label: Result Viewing Method
application_result_method.description: If you are an international student, use the application number. If you are Egyptian and remember your application number, you can enter it or check using your national ID.

application_number.label: Application Number
application_number.description: Enter the application number exactly as submitted when applying.

message_title.label: Message Title
message_title.description: Write a short and clear title that describes your message.

message_content.label: Message Content
message_content.description: Enter the full content of the message clearly, including all important details.

governorate_name.label: Governorate Name
governorate_name.description: Please enter the name of the governorate.

distance_from_cairo.label: Distance from Cairo (km)
distance_from_cairo.description: Please enter the distance of the governorate from Cairo.

acceptance_status.label: Students Will Be Accepted
acceptance_status.placeholder: Check ✔ if the system will accept students from this location

police_station_name.label: Police Station / Center Name
police_station_name.placeholder: Enter the police station / center name
police_station_name.description: Please enter the name of the police station / center.

edu_department_name.label: Educational Administration Name
edu_department_name.description: Please enter the name of the educational administration.

police_station.label: Police Station / Center
police_station.description: Please select the police station / center.

city_name.label: City / Sheikhdom / Village Name
city_name.placeholder: Enter the city / sheikhdom / village name
city_name.description: Please enter the city / sheikhdom / village name.

building_type.label: Building Type
building_type.description: Specify whether this building is designated for male or female students.

floors_count.label: Number of Floors
floors_count.placeholder: Enter the number of floors in the building
floors_count.description: Specify the total number of floors in this building.

is_available_for_stay.label: Available for Stay
is_available_for_stay.placeholder: Check if this building is available for student housing

room_name.label: Room Name
room_name.description: Specify a unique name or number for this room.

room_type.label: Room Type
room_type.description: Choose the room type based on its purpose and available facilities.
room_type.filter_description: Select the room type according to student preferences to filter results.

floor.label: Floor
floor.description: Specify the floor where this room is located.

building.label: Building
building.description: Select the building where this room is located.

room_capacity.label: Capacity
room_capacity.description: Specify the number of students that can occupy this room.

student_nationality.label: Student Nationality
student_nationality.description: Choose whether to filter Egyptian students or expatriate students.

residence_type.label: Residence Type
residence_type.description: Choose whether to filter students residing inside Egypt or outside Egypt.

student_type.label: Student Type
student_type.description: Choose whether to filter new students (first year / preparatory) or old students.

pre_university_education.label: Pre-University Education
pre_university_education.placeholder: Select pre-university education type (Inside / Outside Egypt)
pre_university_education.description: Specify whether the student’s pre-university education was inside or outside Egypt for filtering or exporting data accordingly.

guardian_nationality.label: Guardian Nationality
guardian_nationality.description: Choose whether to filter students based on their guardian’s nationality.

grade.label: Student Academic Grade
grade.description: Choose the student’s academic grade to filter results or include in export.

role.label: User Role
role.description: Choose the appropriate role for the user

meal_name.label: Meal Name
meal_name.description: Enter the name of the meal (e.g., Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner, Suhoor).

meal_is_active.label: Meal Status
meal_is_active.placeholder: Check if the meal is being prepared in the kitchen
meal_is_active.description: This indicates whether the meal can still be prepared again or has been permanently canceled.

meal_category.label: Meal Category
meal_category.description: Choose the type of meal for this schedule.

day_type.label: Day Type
day_type.description: Specify the type of day for which this schedule applies.

meal.label: Meal
meal.description: Choose the meal that will be served on this day.

delivery_start_time.label: Delivery Start Time
delivery_start_time.description: Specify the time when meal delivery to students begins on this day.

delivery_end_time.label: Delivery End Time
delivery_end_time.description: Specify the time when meal delivery to students ends on this day.

booking_start_time.label: Booking Start Time
booking_start_time.description: Specify the time when students can start booking the meal for this day.

booking_end_time.label: Booking End Time
booking_end_time.description: Specify the time when students can no longer book the meal for this day.

application_period_open.label: Application Period Open
application_period_open.description: Specify whether the application period is currently open for students to submit their university housing applications.
application_period_open.hint: Date and time of the last change to the application period status {{date}} {{time}}.

admission_results_announced.label: Admission Results Announced
admission_results_announced.description: Specify whether the university housing admission results have been announced.

online_payment_available.label: Online Payment Available
online_payment_available.description: Specify whether online payment is available for students accepted into university housing.

university_housing_started.label: University Housing Started
university_housing_started.description: Specify whether students have started moving into university housing.

female_visits_available.label: Female Visits Available
female_visits_available.description: Specify whether female visits are allowed in university housing.

restaurant_status.label: Restaurant Status
restaurant_status.description: Specify whether the restaurant inside the university campus is currently open to serve meals to students.

auto_meal_reserve.label: Automatic Meal Reservation
auto_meal_reserve.description: Specify whether meals are automatically reserved for accepted students based on their preferences, or if they must reserve meals manually.

attendance_start.label: Attendance Start Time
attendance_start.description: Specify the time when student attendance recording begins in university housing.

attendance_end.label: Attendance End Time
attendance_end.description: Specify the time when student attendance recording ends in university housing.

need_processed_national_ids.label: Request National ID Card Images File (Egyptians Only)
need_processed_national_ids.description: Generate a Word file containing processed and organized images of national ID cards for Egyptian students only, arranged for easy review and printing.
